DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided enroute operations do not require its use.

Note.Para: For GPS L inoperative, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 23-24-01-01. The TCP L BACKUP NAV status message may be displayed. .

ListItem.Para: The NAV SINGLE GPS advisory message will be displayed.
RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH*, RNP 1/RNP 2*, and Advanced RNP* operations require two Global Positioning System (INR-GPS).
RNAV 1/RNAV 2, and P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV5 operations require one Global Positioning System (INR-GPS).
Enroute operations do not require their use.

Note.Para: The TERR POS advisory message will be displayed. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 34-42-05-03B.
For GPS L inoperative, the airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 23-24-01-01. The TCP L BACKUP NAV status message may be displayed. .
The ADS-B Out data will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 34-42-06-01.

ListItem.Para: The GPS advisory message will be displayed.
The NAV UNABLE RNP caution message may be displayed during lengthy ground operations and flight crew should accomplish the associated non-normal checklist.
The RWY/POS update on the flight management TAKEOFF REF page is active when GPS is inoperative.

Review Operations Specification requirements for route position accuracy and system availability. Consider remaining navigation and approach capability in the event of enroute failure of additional integrated navigation radio functions.
The HUD FPV symbol may display a lateral error of up to 2 degrees
RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH*, RNP 1/RNP 2*, and Advanced RNP* operations require two Global Positioning System (INR-GPS).
RNAV 1/RNAV 2, and P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV5 operations require one Global Positioning System (INR-GPS). *Single configuration requires regulatory agency approval.
